description: 23 - 20-01-2025 - Emails between Michael Roberts (Assurance Deputy Director, CO) and others
text:
Re: P.M's vetting interview. 20 January 2025 at 09:24
Michael Roberts Personal
To: JCS Jcs

JC good morning,

You may well have heard this already, but | spoke to the VCO on Friday following the interview with Lord M. He said that
it was conducted in good spirits - and that Lord M is aware that a follow-up call on Teams will be required on Friday of
this week coming (Friday 24 Jan).

Do let us know if you have any questions or comments.
Michael
On Thu, 16 Jan 2025 at 16:28, Jcs wrote:

OFFICIAL

Many thanks all for your flexibility and understanding on this —_ it's much appreciated. Lord M will be at
the interview tomorrow — I'll confirm precise logistics with Jcs separately.

Jcs

Jcs [eee of US Global Issues and Canada Team pus and Canada Department | Americas and SIDS

‘oreign, Commonwealth & Development Office | Personal |M: Personal
OFFICIAL
From: Jcs
Sent: 16 January 2025 16:24
To: JCS
ei Jes Gerard McGurk
Personal ; Robert Tinline Personal ; Michael Roberts

Personal ; Patricia Dreghorn Personal
Subject: Re: P.M's vetthg interview.
‘You don't often get email from JCS Learn why this is important

Good afternoon

| have spoken with our JCS and he has agreed to cover as much detail as possible in an interview tomorrow. We will
then arrange any follow up as might be required but due to leave and the time pressure, this will be with a
second VCO. JCS has made arrangements for the interview separately and will be at 100 PS as agreed tomorrow.

63

Thanks

JCS
On Thu, 16 Jan 2025 at 15:56, Jcs wrote:
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Hi all,

There have been several conversations on this. To bring it together: we would still like to keep
tomorrow morning's interview in the diary please. We can do the bulk of the topics tomorrow, and
schedule a follow-up if needed on the outstanding bits.

Could | check that works for UKSV colleagues? If so, Lord Mandelson will be at 100PS tomorrow
morning.

Thanks,
Jcs

JCS | Head of US Global Issues and Canada Team | US and Canada Department | Americas and SIDS

Directorate | Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office | E: Personal |M: Personal
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: Jes

Sent: 16 January 2025 14:17

To: JCS

cc: JCs JCS

Subject: P.M's vetting interview.

Dear JCS

Ihave CC'd both JCS and JCS into this email both of whom have a vested interest in the way forward.

Kind regards.

JCS

64


JCS
Vetting Clearance Officer
UKSV, Government Security Group (GSG), Cabinet Office.

Personal

UKSV, Government Security Group

Cabinet Office

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
